# Forward Family Medicine

> Direct Primary Care practice at 295 Old Eagle School Road, Wayne, PA 19087.
> Phone: (215) 645-7044 | Email: Information@forwardfamilymedicine.com

## What Makes Us Different
Forward Family Medicine is the only DPC practice on the Main Line offering
in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine as an integrated part of primary care.
Dr. Philip Lieberman is dual board-certified in Family Medicine and Lifestyle Medicine,
with a background in culinary arts and nutrition science.

## Providers
- Dr. David Bigley, DO — Family Medicine, PCOM graduate, osteopathic/holistic approach
- Dr. Philip Lieberman, MD — Family Medicine + Lifestyle Medicine (dual board-certified),
  culinary arts background, U.S. Navy physician, Thomas Jefferson University
- Ritamarie Smedile, PhD, RN — Clinical operations, maternal health, integrative wellness

## Services
- Direct Primary Care (DPC) — flat monthly membership, no insurance
- Lifestyle Medicine — in-person, board-certified, integrated into membership
- Concierge Medicine

## Location
Wayne, Pennsylvania 19087 — serving the Main Line and surrounding communities

## How to Get Started
Visit forwardfamilymedicine.com/contact or call (215) 645-7044 for a free meet and greet.
